title: Lumina Shaders
description: Nice shaderpack designed to add better graphics To Minecraft
body:
A no-nonsense shaderpack that gets the job done.
This shaderpack won't promise you cinematic perfection — but it will give your world shadows, lightning, and dynamic lighting without destroying your framerate. Built for players who want their game to look better without a PhD in graphics settings.
Features:

🌑 Realistic shadows
⚡ Lighting effects
💡 Dynamic lighting (torches actually light things up!)
And for support:
👍[Discord server Lumina Shaders](https://discord.gg/HCTzHFkSre)

Requirements:

Requires Iris Shaders — OptiFine is not supported.

Screenshots show off plains forests, the Nether, The End, and caves — all running on this pack.
If something breaks, Deal with it. Im joking Just tell me in the Discord
— The Developer
